prose:
The frontier orbitals of ethylene have been computed using Density Functional Theory (DFT) with the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (tier `standard`) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. The geometry was taken from the provided `.xyz` file and not optimized at this level. The SCF converged successfully in 6 cycles.

The HOMO-LUMO gap for ethylene is **7.4357 eV**.
The HOMO energy is -7.6156 eV.
The LUMO energy is -0.1799 eV.
